The tagline DON'T LET today GET AWAY sits below. No visual changes occur between frames; the graphic composition remains fixed and unchanged throughout the two-second interval.

The black title screen cuts to a wide aerial shot of a long causeway road stretching through turquoise shallow waters and green land masses. White buildings line the road under a blue sky with clouds. The gold shield logo remains visible as a small watermark in the bottom right corner.

The scene cuts to an aerial shot tracking a white motorboat speeding through a narrow channel of turquoise water. Dense green mangroves flank both sides of the waterway. The boat leaves a foamy white wake as it moves away from the camera. The gold shield logo persists in the bottom right corner.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of two men on a boat. A man on the left stands wearing a beige long-sleeved shirt, white pants, cap, and sunglasses. Beside him, another man sits wearing a light blue shirt and visor, steering the wheel. The Bonefish Grill logo remains in the bottom right corner.

A man in a light blue shirt and beige shorts stands on a boat holding a bent fishing rod. He faces right, away from the camera, manipulating the reel. Green mangroves line the shore in the background under a cloudy sky. The gold shield logo persists in the bottom right corner.

A smiling man in a light blue shirt and cap holds a large silver fish with both hands. The scene cuts to a high-angle aerial view of bright turquoise ocean water with a white skeletal lighthouse tower standing on a reef and a small boat in the distance.

summary.text: [0-6] Static black background displays "Jamaican Rum Sauce" and "THE FLORIDA KEYS" above a gold "BONEFISH GRILL" shield logo with fish skeleton and tagline "DON'T LET today GET AWAY". [6-8] Aerial view shows long causeway road stretching through turquoise shallow waters and green land masses with white buildings. [8-10] Aerial shot tracks white motorboat speeding through narrow channel of turquoise water flanked by dense green mangroves. [10-12] Two men on boat: one stands in beige long-sleeved shirt, white pants, cap, sunglasses; other sits in light blue shirt, visor steering wheel. Logo watermark remains bottom right.

[14-16] A smiling man in a light blue shirt and cap holds a large silver fish, cutting to an aerial of bright turquoise water with a white skeletal lighthouse. [20-22] The men laugh, cutting to the man in yellow holding a silver fish with yellow fins. [22-24] A man in black arranges food on a stainless steel counter with staff behind, followed by a pan engulfed in flames. [24-26] The man in black stands by a woman in a white chef's coat who waves near plate stacks. [26-28] A close-up shows the man in yellow drinking from a clear glass against a wooden wall with a blue hanging object.

[36-38] A close-up reveals a stainless steel table holding a round, golden-brown baked dish in a glass pan, three glass bowls containing ingredients, metal tongs, and a red square plate with a metal spatula. [38-40] The shot returns to the two men as a new banner identifies the man on the left as "Robert Pallone, Rum Ambassador, Meyers Rum" while both look down toward the food preparation area.
